ALLONE
AI Convergence Agency
March 9, 2026
Ref: ALL-2026-0312
Dear Mr. Anderson,

Global Industries Ltd.
Innovation Department
Thank you for your interest in our AI convergence solutions. Following our discussion, I am pleased to present our proposal for transforming your operational infrastructure through intelligent automation.
Our approach combines custom AI models, workflow automation, and strategic consulting to deliver measurable results. As demonstrated with our existing clients, we consistently achieve 85-90% cost reduction in operational processes while improving output quality.
I look forward to discussing the next steps at your earliest convenience.
Kutaisi Kutasidze
Founder & CEO, ALLONE
